## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Windows package build, if plugin/package files changed
- [ ] iikoFront smoke, if fiscal-register behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior/operator flow changed

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Beta only
- [ ] Stable candidate

## Safety

- [ ] No raw secrets, customer logs, DPAPI files, or production configs added
- [ ] Rollback notes included when needed
